description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Standard Build and Test that runs on manual dispatch, pull requests to any branch except when paths .github/workflows/docker_publish.yml, .github/workflows/changelog_test.yml, docker/**, or CHANGELOG.rst are changed, and on push to the develop branch with similar path exclusions. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to run a composite BuildTest action across different stages (base_python, moab, dagmc, openmc) and HDF5 configurations, using a container image from ghcr.io/pyne.
